title: Phase 4C: frontend hosting, packaging, E2E, and delivery hardening
body:
## Goal

锁定最终前端交付模型，补 E2E 覆盖，硬化 CI / performance budgets，并文档化 Tauri 结论。

## Parent

- #12

## Depends on

- #22
- #23

## Deliverables

- final frontend hosting / packaging decision
- backend static hosting or documented alternative
- Playwright smoke coverage
- CI hardening for delivery path
- desktop evaluation document

## Acceptance

- `/` 能以最终交付模型提供前端入口，或有明确的独立分发方案
- Playwright 覆盖 overview 与 operations 关键 smoke path
- Tauri 是否进入后续实现有明确结论

## Verification

- `pytest tests/unit_tests/admin/test_static_hosting.py -v`
- `cd apps/admin-web && npx playwright test`
- `powershell -File scripts/check-governance.ps1`

## Not In Scope

- 多用户 SaaS 化
- 远程控制平面

## Plan

- See `docs/plans/2026-03-23-nautilustrader-admin-console-phase-4-workbench-delivery.md`

title: Phase 4B: unified workbench navigation and workspace model
body:
## Goal

把 operations 与 analysis 合并到同一 workbench shell，并引入本地 workspace model。

## Parent

- #12

## Depends on

- #22

## Deliverables

- unified workbench shell
- local workspace store
- navigation updates for operations / analysis entry points

## Acceptance

- operator 可以在一个壳层中切换 operations 与 analysis
- workspace model 只依赖本地单用户存储，不引入远程协作假设

## Verification

- `cd apps/admin-web && npm test -- --run src/test/workbench-shell.test.tsx`
- `cd apps/admin-web && npm run build`

## Not In Scope

- 前端静态资源托管
- Playwright / packaging

## Plan

- See `docs/plans/2026-03-23-nautilustrader-admin-console-phase-4-workbench-delivery.md`

title: Phase 4A: backtest and report integration
body:
## Goal

把 backtest tasks 和 report views 接入 admin workbench，但不扩展到策略编辑器范围。

## Parent

- #12

## Depends on

- #11

## Deliverables

- backtest task DTO / API / page
- report summary DTO / API / page
- analysis entry points in workbench navigation

## Acceptance

- backtests / reports 可在 workbench 中浏览与查看结果
- 不把 scope 扩张为复杂策略编辑器

## Verification

- `pytest tests/unit_tests/admin/test_backtests_api.py tests/unit_tests/admin/test_reports_api.py -v`
- `cd apps/admin-web && npm test -- --run`
- `cd apps/admin-web && npm run build`

## Not In Scope

- workspace model
- 前端最终交付模型

## Plan

- See `docs/plans/2026-03-23-nautilustrader-admin-console-phase-4-workbench-delivery.md`

title: Phase 3C: catalog, history, event playback, and diagnostics
body:
## Goal

交付 catalog browsing、bounded history queries、event playback 和 link-health diagnostics。

## Parent

- #11

## Depends on

- #19
- #20

## Deliverables

- catalog browse / history query DTO
- playback request DTO
- diagnostics summary / link health / query timing
- catalog / playback / diagnostics pages

## Acceptance

- 大查询必须有 limit、time range 和 operator-visible feedback
- diagnostics 失败路径不会静默吞掉
- 仅在本 issue 内引入图表依赖，不扩散到无关页面

## Verification

- `pytest tests/unit_tests/admin/test_catalog_api.py tests/unit_tests/admin/test_diagnostics_api.py -v`
- `cd apps/admin-web && npm test -- --run`
- `cd apps/admin-web && npm run build`

## Not In Scope

- 多用户协作
- 最终打包与 E2E

## Plan

- See `docs/plans/2026-03-23-nautilustrader-admin-console-phase-3-trading-operations-diagnostics.md`

title: Phase 3B: accounts, margin, and risk center
body:
## Goal

交付 accounts、margin、exposure 和 risk-center 视图，用于日常 live operations。

## Parent

- #11

## Depends on

- #19

## Deliverables

- risk summary / events / blocks API
- margin / balances / exposure summaries
- risk center page
- account drill-down enhancements

## Acceptance

- operator 可以在一个阶段内完成账户与风控巡检
- risk / margin / exposure 数据都有明确摘要和 degraded state

## Verification

- `pytest tests/unit_tests/admin/test_risk_api.py -v`
- `cd apps/admin-web && npm test -- --run`
- `cd apps/admin-web && npm run build`

## Not In Scope

- catalog / playback / diagnostics
- 桌面交付

## Plan

- See `docs/plans/2026-03-23-nautilustrader-admin-console-phase-3-trading-operations-diagnostics.md`

title: Phase 3A: blotter, fills, and position drill-down
body:
## Goal

交付高信息密度的 blotter、fills 和 position drill-down surfaces，支持 richer DTO、pagination 和 operator workflows。

## Parent

- #11

## Depends on

- #10

## Deliverables

- fills DTO / API / page
- richer orders / positions filters and pagination
- blotter and drill-down UI
- limited AG Grid adoption for trading ops pages

## Acceptance

- blotter / fills / positions 页面支持分页和 drill-down
- 大数据量页面不会回退到无界渲染
- 失败与空态都有显式反馈

## Verification

- `pytest tests/unit_tests/admin/test_fills_api.py -v`
- `cd apps/admin-web && npm test -- --run`
- `cd apps/admin-web && npm run build`

## Not In Scope

- 风险中心
- catalog / diagnostics
- 最终交付打包

## Plan

- See `docs/plans/2026-03-23-nautilustrader-admin-console-phase-3-trading-operations-diagnostics.md`

title: Phase 2C: command confirmations, audit timeline, and recovery runbooks
body:
## Goal

增加显式命令确认、operator-visible receipts、audit timeline UI、config diff 视图和恢复 / runbook affordances。

## Parent

- #10

## Depends on

- #16
- #17

## Deliverables

- confirm command dialog
- command receipts in UI
- audit timeline page
- config inspect / diff view
- recovery / runbook affordances

## Acceptance

- 所有命令入口先确认后执行
- operator 能看到 accepted / completed / failed 回执
- 审计时间线可回溯关键控制动作

## Verification

- `cd apps/admin-web && npm test -- --run src/test/confirm-command-dialog.test.tsx`
- `cd apps/admin-web && npm test -- --run src/test/audit-timeline.test.tsx`
- `cd apps/admin-web && npm run build`

## Not In Scope

- 多用户审批流
- 交易类高风险命令

## Plan

- See `docs/plans/2026-03-23-nautilustrader-admin-console-phase-2-control-audit.md`

title: Phase 2B: low-risk strategy, adapter, and subscription controls
body:
## Goal

增加 strategies、adapters 和 market subscriptions 的低风险 backend / frontend controls。

## Parent

- #10

## Depends on

- #16

## Deliverables

- strategy start / stop controls
- adapter connect / disconnect controls
- market subscription controls
- typed command receipts and WS events

## Acceptance

- 所有命令都返回 typed receipt
- WS 可发出 `command.accepted / completed / failed`
- 仍然不包含任何交易类命令

## Verification

- `pytest tests/unit_tests/admin/test_strategy_commands.py tests/unit_tests/admin/test_adapter_commands.py tests/unit_tests/admin/test_subscription_commands.py -v`
- `cd apps/admin-web && npm test -- --run`
- `cd apps/admin-web && npm run build`

## Not In Scope

- 批量交易动作
- 风险极高或不可逆命令

## Plan

- See `docs/plans/2026-03-23-nautilustrader-admin-console-phase-2-control-audit.md`

title: Phase 2A: command contract, error codes, and audit sink
body:
## Goal

定义 admin control plane 的 typed command requests、receipts、errors 和 append-only audit records。

## Parent

- #10

## Depends on

- #9

## Deliverables

- command request DTO
- command receipt / failure DTO
- error code catalog
- append-only audit sink

## Acceptance

- 所有后续控制命令都有统一 typed contract 可复用
- audit records 可表达 accepted / completed / failed
- 仍然保持本机单人模式，不为 RBAC 做提前抽象

## Verification

- `pytest tests/unit_tests/admin/test_commands_schema.py tests/unit_tests/admin/test_audit_service.py -v`

## Not In Scope

- 具体控制 endpoint
- 前端确认 UI
- 高风险交易命令

## Plan

- See `docs/plans/2026-03-23-nautilustrader-admin-console-phase-2-control-audit.md`

title: Phase 4: unified workbench and delivery hardening
body:
## Goal

把管理控制台从“本地开发可运行的运维台”提升为“统一工作台 + 可交付产物”，覆盖回测/报告集成、工作台整合、前端托管/打包、E2E 与性能硬化。

## Depends on

- #11

## Child issues

- #22
- #23
- #24

## Phase Close-Out Owned By This Umbrella

本 issue 不直接承载功能实现，负责 `Phase 4` 的阶段收尾：

- 确认 `#22`、`#23`、`#24` 都已通过 PR 合并
- 完成 phase 级 truth docs / `memory/*` 更新
- 依据 phase plan 执行最终验收

## Acceptance

- `#22`、`#23`、`#24` 全部完成
- live operations 与 analysis 进入同一 workbench
- 前端交付模型被明确且可验证
- E2E、性能与监控不再停留在文档层
- 是否采用 Tauri 有明确结论

## Verification

- `powershell -File scripts/check-governance.ps1`
- `pytest tests/unit_tests/admin -v`
- `cd apps/admin-web && npm test -- --run`
- `cd apps/admin-web && npm run build`
- `cd apps/admin-web && npx playwright test`

## Not In Scope

- 多用户 SaaS 化
- 远程部署控制平面

## Plan

- See `docs/plans/2026-03-23-nautilustrader-admin-console-phase-4-workbench-delivery.md`

title: Phase 3: trading operations and diagnostics surfaces
body:
## Goal

把控制台扩展为可日常运维的交易与诊断工作台，包括 blotter、position drill-down、账户与风控中心，以及 catalog / history / playback / diagnostics 能力。

## Depends on

- #10

## Child issues

- #19
- #20
- #21

## Phase Close-Out Owned By This Umbrella

本 issue 不直接承载功能实现，负责 `Phase 3` 的阶段收尾：

- 确认 `#19`、`#20`、`#21` 都已通过 PR 合并
- 完成 phase 级 truth docs / `memory/*` 更新
- 依据 phase plan 执行最终验收

## Acceptance

- `#19`、`#20`、`#21` 全部完成
- blotter / fills / positions / accounts / risk 页面具备日常运维可用性
- catalog / history / diagnostics 具备明确查询边界
- 大查询和慢查询不会静默卡死 UI

## Verification

- `powershell -File scripts/check-governance.ps1`
- `pytest tests/unit_tests/admin -v`
- `cd apps/admin-web && npm test -- --run`
- `cd apps/admin-web && npm run build`

## Not In Scope

- 多用户协作
- 桌面壳
- 最终交付打包

## Plan

- See `docs/plans/2026-03-23-nautilustrader-admin-console-phase-3-trading-operations-diagnostics.md`

title: Phase 2: admin control commands and audit loop
body:
## Goal

在只读控制台基础上，引入低风险控制命令、显式确认、typed command receipt 和本机审计闭环。

## Depends on

- #9

## Child issues

- #16
- #17
- #18

## Phase Close-Out Owned By This Umbrella

本 issue 不直接承载功能实现，负责 `Phase 2` 的阶段收尾：

- 确认 `#16`、`#17`、`#18` 都已通过 PR 合并
- 完成 phase 级 truth docs / `memory/*` 更新
- 依据 phase plan 执行最终验收

## Acceptance

- `#16`、`#17`、`#18` 全部完成
- 所有控制动作都需要显式确认
- 所有控制动作都有 typed receipt
- 所有控制动作都写入本机审计记录
- 本阶段没有高风险交易命令

## Verification

- `powershell -File scripts/check-governance.ps1`
- `pytest tests/unit_tests/admin -v`
- `cd apps/admin-web && npm test -- --run`
- `cd apps/admin-web && npm run build`

## Not In Scope

- 批量下单或交易修改
- 高风险不可逆操作
- 多用户权限
- 桌面交付

## Plan

- See `docs/plans/2026-03-23-nautilustrader-admin-console-phase-2-control-audit.md`

title: Phase 1: admin console read-only operations surfaces
body:
## Goal

在 `#8` 的 `Overview` 垂直切片之上，交付首个可日常使用的只读运维控制台，包括多页面壳层以及 `Nodes / Strategies / Adapters / Orders / Positions / Accounts / Logs` 只读视图。

## Depends on

- #8

## Child issues

- #13
- #14
- #15

## Phase Close-Out Owned By This Umbrella

本 issue 不直接承载功能实现，负责 `Phase 1` 的阶段收尾：

- 确认 `#13`、`#14`、`#15` 都已通过 PR 合并
- 完成 phase 级 truth docs / `memory/*` 更新
- 依据 phase plan 执行最终验收

## Acceptance

- `#13`、`#14`、`#15` 全部完成
- 所有只读页面可独立加载
- 页面统一使用 shared page states
- 后端 DTO 与前端 query / invalidation 语义一致
- 本阶段没有任何控制命令入口

## Verification

- `powershell -File scripts/check-governance.ps1`
- `pytest tests/unit_tests/admin -v`
- `cd apps/admin-web && npm test -- --run`
- `cd apps/admin-web && npm run build`

## Not In Scope

- 策略启停、适配器重连、订阅控制等命令
- 审计时间线
- AG Grid / Lightweight Charts
- Playwright
- 前端打包与桌面壳

## Plan

- See `docs/plans/2026-03-23-nautilustrader-admin-console-phase-1-read-only-operations.md`
